title: 💻 Our System
lead: All the service processes you will learn in this course are performed through Salesforce, our central customer relationship management platform.

highlight.title: Why Salesforce?
highlight.text: Salesforce centralizes all services in one place, ensuring traceability, standardization, and agility in handling each request.

cta.title: Ready to start?
cta.text: In the following pages, you will learn how each communication channel works and how to use the system to ensure the best customer experience.
